articles.title_raw: МИД РФ: Москва обеспокоена военно-техническим содействием Токио Киеву
articles.lead_raw: Замглавы российского дипведомства Михаил Галузин встретился с депутатом палаты советников парламента Японии Мунэо Судзуки

articles.title_en: Russia announces Victory Day ceasefire, threatens missile strike on Kyiv if Ukraine disrupts celebrations
articles.lead_en: Russia’s Defense Ministry announced on the evening of May 4 that Vladimir Putin had ordered a “ceasefire in honor of the Victory Day celebrations” on May 8 and 9. “We expect the Ukrainian side to follow this example,” the ministry said, warning that if Ukraine attempted to disrupt the celebrations, Russian armed forces would “deliver a retaliatory, massive missile strike on the center of Kyiv.”
articles.title_raw: Russia announces Victory Day ceasefire, threatens missile strike on Kyiv if Ukraine disrupts celebrations
articles.lead_raw: Russia’s Defense Ministry announced on the evening of May 4 that Vladimir Putin had ordered a “ceasefire in honor of the Victory Day celebrations” on May 8 and 9. “We expect the Ukrainian side to follow this example,” the ministry said, warning that if Ukraine attempted to disrupt the celebrations, Russian armed forces would “deliver a retaliatory, massive missile strike on the center of Kyiv.”

articles.title_en: Russian forces kill 4, injure over 30 in strike on Ukraine’s Poltava region
articles.lead_en: Russian forces struck the Poltava region with drones and missiles, killing four people and knocking out gas service for nearly 3,500 subscribers, regional military administration head Vitaliy Dyakivnych reported. Direct hits and debris were recorded at two locations in the Poltava district.
articles.title_raw: Russian forces kill 4, injure over 30 in strike on Ukraine’s Poltava region

articles.title_en: Burevestnik volunteer fighters destroy Ukraine’s Martian-2 attack UAVs
articles.lead_en: The Russian Defense Ministry reported that all the devices were promptly detected, intercepted, and destroyed before reaching their intended deployment area

articles.title_en: Russian Security Council secretary, CSTO chief discuss collective security
articles.lead_en: Taalatbek Masadykov briefed Sergey Shoigu on the results of his meetings with the leadership of CSTO member states in the first half of the year
